mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transfer_application (employee_id, from_dept_id, to_dept_id, from_position_id, to_position_id, transfer_reason, effective_date, old_manager_approved, new_manager_approved, status, submitter_id) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{fromDeptId}, #{toDeptId}, #{fromPositionId}, #{toPositionId}, #{transferReason}, #{effectiveDate}, #{oldManagerApproved}, #{newManagerApproved}, #{status}, #{submitterId})
mapper.select: SELECT ta.*, e.name AS employee_name, fd.dept_name AS from_dept_name, td.dept_name AS to_dept_name, fp.position_name AS from_position_name, tp.position_name AS to_position_name, su.username AS submitter_name FROM transfer_application ta JOIN employee e ON ta.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department fd ON ta.from_dept_id = fd.id LEFT JOIN department td ON ta.to_dept_id = td.id LEFT JOIN position fp ON ta.from_position_id = fp.id LEFT JOIN position tp ON ta.to_position_id = tp.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ta.submitter_id = su.id WHERE ta.id = #{id}
